title: Problem with updating subitems date column with webhook from Zapier

posts.author: GigafibAMI (Andreas Myreng Iversen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I cant get the date column to update with the values in this webhook and i get no errors, the date field is just not populated. Can anyone help me with what i am doing wrong?

image939×1100 87.8 KB

I am new to creating webhooks and json so please take that in mind in the answer
